chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1546 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 23.10.2025 Petitioner present in person. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General along with SIP Ali Murad Narejo on behalf of SSP Khairpur and SIP Mouladad P.S Khenwari..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Miran Bux Shar, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.9 and 11, same is taken on record. The parawise comments and statement along with certain documents, have been filed by SSP Khairpur and SHO P.S Khanewari, same are taken on record. Copies thereof have been provided to the petitioner. AAG submits that there is no provision of license as it is provided in the Sindh Fisheries Ordinance, 1980. Under the circumstances, instant petition is not maintainable and same is hereby dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
